sources.title: SparkToro - Audience Research & Keyword Intelligence Platform
sources.note: Official homepage of SparkToro, Rand Fishkin's audience research platform for keyword and SERP analysis. Primary source for his keyword research methodology.

sources.title: Lost and Founder: A Painfully Honest Field Guide to the Startup World
sources.note: Rand Fishkin's published book on startup world including SEO and keyword research insights. Published by Portfolio/Penguin.

sources.title: There Are Four Kinds of Keyword Research - SparkToro Blog
sources.note: Rand Fishkin's influential article defining four types of keyword research: SEO/PPC, social media, content creation, and market/audience research.

sources.title: In 2020 Two-Thirds of Google Searches Ended Without a Click - SparkToro
sources.note: Rand Fishkin's landmark research on zero-click searches and SERP analysis, demonstrating his expertise in search behavior and keyword research methodology.
